Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface FloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of the floating-point number
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<FloatingPointVerifier<T>,​T>, ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<FloatingPointVerifier<T>,​T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<FloatingPointVerifier<T>,​T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<FloatingPointVerifier<T>,​T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
DoubleVerifierImpl, FloatingPointVerifierNoOp, FloatVerifierImpl
public interface FloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
extends ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<FloatingPointVerifier<T>,​T>
Verifies the requirements of a floating-point number.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectVerifier) imply ExtensibleObjectVerifier.isNotNull().

  • Method Summary

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableVerifier

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier

    isFinite, isNotFinite, isNotNumber, isNumber

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleNumberVerifier

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotWholeNumber, isNotZero, isPositive, isWholeNumber, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs
